programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Oversized Wish List in Kansas City
programs.desc: A surgeon is moving his wife and family to Kansas City, Mo., for a new job; she wants a big, bright farmhouse with some acreage while he wants a home with character, in a traditional neighborhood and close to work.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A couple is at odds over head space in a potential new home; one wants a Cape Cod with a home office and doesn't mind sloping roofs, but finding a vintage home where the other doesn't have to duck in each room is a tall order.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A duo that's ready to purchase their first house in New York has a large problem fitting in places, as he's 7 feet 2 inches tall and needs high ceilings, but she is focused on a kitchen for herself.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: It Takes a Village in Tucson
programs.desc: A newly single chef in Tucson searches for a home with her 12-year-old daughter; she's looking for a place that's close to work with a chef's kitchen and a nice master suite, and her daughter is hoping for a swimming pool.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A family of repeat movers looks for another house in Lake Norman, N.C.; he's willing to go with a smaller, fixer-upper to get a prime location on the lake, while she wants a grand property that is move-in ready.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A Texas couple that's always searching for their next home look for something with history in San Antonio; he's willing to take on a fixer-upper, but she doesn't share his desire after their first renovation experience.
